subject: forms: apply all 8 audit findings — error handling, a11y labels, autofill hints
body:
Forms-trigger pass. Every touched form now has proper async error surfacing, screen-reader-announced live counters, and accessibility-hinted autofill behaviour. HIGH (3) - ProposeChangeForm: onSubmit prop widened to `void | Promise`; handleSubmit awaits it inside try/catch/finally. On failure: error surfaces above the submit button ("Failed to submit — try again in a moment"). `submitting` state gates the button + flips label to "Submitting…" so double-clicks can't fire duplicate proposals. - AddNoteForm: same pattern. Label flips to "Adding…" during flight. - NudgeExpiryConfig: added `inputMode="numeric"` so iOS/Android show the numeric keypad instead of QWERTY for the 1-365 nudge-days field. MEDIUM (3) - Character counters on ProposeChangeForm, AddNoteForm, ModuleEditor, ModuleSummaryEditor now carry `role="status" aria-atomic="true"`. `role="status"` implies polite aria-live; `aria-atomic="true"` forces the full "N / MAX" text to be announced on every update rather than just the changed characters. Screen readers throttle polite announcements so keystroke-level updates don't become chatter — but users near the cap get the feedback they need. - SplitAgreementForm: the checkbox group is now a proper
with , and the error

gets `id="split-agreement-error"` + `role="alert"`. The fieldset adds `aria-describedby` pointing at the error id when an error is present. Assistive tech now associates "Please select at least one module" with the group that failed. - ContractUploadPreview rename input: explicit `aria-label={`Rename section (currently "${mod.title}")`}` on the input itself. Previously users who reached the input via direct keyboard focus (not through the preceding rename button) lost the context the button's aria-label had provided. LOW (2) - InviteCounterpartyForm email field: `autoComplete="email"`, `inputMode="email"`, `autoCapitalize="none"`, `autoCorrect="off"`, `spellCheck={false}`. Mobile autofill + browser-level email recognition now work; typing stops trying to sentence-case the first letter. Passphrase field: `autoComplete="off"` (this is a side-channel shared secret, not a real password — we don't want password managers saving it), plus the same no-capitalize/no-correct/ no-spellcheck companions. Comment explains the intent so a future reviewer doesn't add `autoComplete="current-password"` by default. - ModuleEditor empty-content validation: left unvalidated per the audit's intent question. Added a comment in handleSave explaining why content emptiness is acceptable (skeleton modules / reverted drafts) and naming the guards that do exist (title-required + disabled-unless-hasChanges). Tests 155/155 passing — vi.fn() in ProposeChangeForm + AddNoteForm tests awaits as undefined, so the async widening is backward- compatible with existing mocks. tsc -b clean, eslint clean. Tags: forms, a11y, error-handling, autofill Complexity: 2 Urgency: 2 Impact: user-facing Risk: low Debt: paid Epic: frontend-audit-sweep Semver: patch https://claude.ai/code/session_01DSZvMKdsQcJKo9vhDZzhxo
